_**User**_

现在电脑端启动之后一直显示使用的是第一个阶沿但是看日志实际上使用的并不是第一个节点这应该是一个显示上的bug请你找到这个问题的来源是什么然后尝试修复它

我使用的组都是 fallback

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
用户反馈了一个问题：电脑端启动后，界面上显示使用的是第一个节点（阶沿可能是"节点"的输入错误），但是查看日志发现实际使用的并不是第一个节点。这是一个显示上的bug。用户使用的组都是fallback类型。

这是一个Clash Verge Rev项目，看起来是一个Tauri应用。我需要：
1. 探索代码库，找到显示当前节点的UI逻辑
2. 找到实际节点选择的逻辑
3. 找出为什么显示和实际不一致
4. 修复这个bug

由于这是一个复杂的问题，需要探索多个部分的代码：
- 前端UI显示当前节点的代码
- 后端获取当前节点状态的代码
- fallback组的节点选择逻辑

我应该使用Task工具来探索代码库，找到相关的代码。</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

我理解了，您遇到的问题是：启动后界面显示使用的是第一个节点，但实际日志显示使用的是其他节点。这是一个显示同步的bug，特别是针对fallback组。

让我探索代码库来找到这个问题的根源。

_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="task_v2">

}

useVerge();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 缓存\\\\\\\\n  const config = useMemo(\\\\\\\\n    () =\u003e ({\\\\\\\\n : selectedGroup;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\\\\\\\\n      await selectNodeForGroup(targetGroup || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GLOBAL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", lastNode.name);\\\\\\\\n      localStorage.setItem(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxy-chain-group\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", targetGroup || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GLOBAL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n      localStorage.setItem(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxy-chain-exit-node\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", lastNode.name);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 刷新代理信息以更新连接状态\\\\\\\\n      refreshProxy();\\\\\\\\n      debugLog(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Successfully connected to proxy chain\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      console.error(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Failed to connect to proxy chain:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error);\\\\\\\\n      alert(t(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxies.page.chain.connectFailed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") || \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"连接链式代理失败\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\");\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n { useEffect, useRef } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"react\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { invoke } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@tauri-apps/api/core\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { useAppData } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/providers/app-data-context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { useProfiles } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/hooks/use-profiles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { debugLog } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/utils/debug\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 关闭连接操作的时间戳（此后一段时间内不发送 fallback 切换通知）\\\\\\\\nlet closeConnectionsTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// TUN/系统代理模式切换的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet proxyModeChangeTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动测速操作的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet manualDelayCheckTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动选择节点操作的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet manualProxySelectionTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 关闭连接后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst CLOSE_CONNECTIONS_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// TUN/系统代理模式切换后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst PROXY_MODE_CHANGE_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 60000; // 1分钟\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动测速后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst MANUAL_DELAY_CHECK_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动选择节点后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst MANUAL_PROXY_SELECTION_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记关闭连接操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markCloseConnectionsStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  closeConnectionsTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Close connections started at ${closeConnectionsTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记 TUN/系统代理模式切换\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 1 分钟内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markProxyModeChanged = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  proxyModeChangeTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Proxy mode changed at ${proxyModeChangeTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记手动测速操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markManualDelayCheckStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  manualDelayCheckTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Manual delay check started at ${manualDelayCheckTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记手动选择节点操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知（避免误报「节点自动切换」）\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markManualProxySelectionStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  manualProxySelectionTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Manual proxy selection started at ${manualProxySelectionTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 检查是否在任何冷却期内\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const isInNotifyCooldown = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查关闭连接冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (closeConnectionsTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const closeElapsed = now - closeConnectionsTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (closeElapsed \u003c CLOSE_CONNECTIONS_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"close_connections\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: closeElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查代理模式切换冷却期（1分钟）\\\\\\\\n  if (proxyModeChangeTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const modeElapsed = now - proxyModeChangeTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (modeElapsed \u003c PROXY_MODE_CHANGE_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxy_mode_change\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: modeElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查手动测速冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (manualDelayCheckTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const delayElapsed = now - manualDelayCheckTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (delayElapsed \u003c MANUAL_DELAY_CHECK_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"manual_delay_check\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: delayElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查手动选择节点冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (manualProxySelectionTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const selectionElapsed = now - manualProxySelectionTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (selectionElapsed \u003c MANUAL_PROXY_SELECTION_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"manual_proxy_selection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: selectionElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return { inCooldown: false, reason: null, elapsed: 0 };\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Hook to monitor fallback/urltest proxy group switches and send notifications\\\\\\\\n * Only sends notifications when the switch is NOT triggered by close-all-connections\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const useFallbackSwitchNotify = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  const { proxies: proxiesData } = useAppData();\\\\\\\\n  const { current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles } = useProfiles();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 保存上一次的代理组状态\\\\\\\\n  const previousGroupsRef = useRef\u003cMap\u003cstring, string\u003e\u003e(new Map());\\\\\\\\n  // 是否已初始化（跳过首次加载）\\\\\\\\n  const isInitializedRef = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n    if (!proxiesData?.groups) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const currentGroups = new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 收集当前所有 Fallback 和 URLTest 类型组的 now 值\\\\\\\\n    for (const group of proxiesData.groups) {\\\\\\\\n      if ([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"URLTest\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fallback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"].includes(group.type) \u0026\u0026 group.now) {\\\\\\\\n        currentGroups.set(group.name, group.now);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 首次加载，只保存状态不检测变化\\\\\\\\n    if (!isInitializedRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n      previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\\\\\\\\n      isInitializedRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      debugLog(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[FallbackNotify] Initialized with groups:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", Object.fromEntries(currentGroups));\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 检测变化\\\\\\\\n    const previousGroups = previousGroupsRef.current;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\\\\\\\\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 检测到节点切换\\\\\\\\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\\\\\\\\n        debugLog(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // fallback 触发：清空该组的手动选择，界面不再显示「当前节点」\\\\\\\\n        if (current) {\\\\\\\\n          const next = (current.selected ?? []).filter((s) =\u003e s.name !== groupName);\\\\\\\\n          if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {\\\\\\\\n            patchCurrent({ selected: next })\\\\\\\\n              .then(() =\u003e mutateProfiles())\\\\\\\\n              .catch(() =\u003e {});\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\\\\\\\\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\\\\\\\\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\\\\\\\\n          debugLog(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n          invoke(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\\n            group: groupName,\\\\\\\\n            from: previousNow,\\\\\\\\n            to: currentNow,\\\\\\\\n          })\\\\\\\\n            .then(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n              debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Notification sent for group ${groupName}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n            })\\\\\\\\n            .catch((error) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n              console.error(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Failed to send notification:&#96;, error);\\\\\\\\n            });\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 更新保存的状态\\\\\\\\n    previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\\\\\\\\n  }, [proxiesData?.groups, current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles]);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":190}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"b2859ef7-cc83-42ed-9926-7fe738b47f20\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f6f03eb0-31b3-42b6-a10e-2716a0ee1195\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-02T13:39:54.492Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[]   let verge_arc = verge.latest_arc();\\\\\\\\n    let IVerge {\\\\\\\\n        ref enable_tun_mode,\\\\\\\\n        ref enable_tun_override,\\\\\\\\n        ref enable_builtin_enhanced,\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/utils/debug\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 缓存连接清理\\\\\\\\nconst cleanupConnections = async (previousProxy: string) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { connections } = await getConnections();\\\\\\\\n    const cleanupPromises = (connections ?? [])\\\\\\\\n      .filter((conn) =\u003e conn.chains.includes(previousProxy))\\\\\\\\n      .map((conn) =\u003e closeConnection(conn.id));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (cleanupPromises.length \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n      await Promise.allSettled(cleanupPromises);\\\\\\\\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 清理了 ${cleanupPromises.length} 个连接&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    console.warn(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[ProxySelection] 连接清理失败:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface ProxySelectionOptions {\\\\\\\\n  onSuccess?: () =\u003e void;\\\\\\\\n  onError?: (error: any) =\u003e void;\\\\\\\\n  enableConnectionCleanup?: boolean;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 代理选择 Hook\\\\\\\\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\\\\\\\\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 缓存\\\\\\\\n  const config = useMemo(\\\\\\\\n    () =\u003e ({\\\\\\\\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\\\\\\\\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\\\\\\\\n    }),\\\\\\\\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 切换节点（参考安卓端：立即切换，后台同步，不使用锁以保证响应灵敏）\\\\\\\\n  const changeProxy = useCallback(\\\\\\\\n    async (\\\\\\\\n      groupName: string,\\\\\\\\n      proxyName: string,\\\\\\\\n      previousProxy?: string,\\\\\\\\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\\\\\\\\n    ) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        if (!current || skipConfigSave) return;\\\\\\\\n        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\\\\\\\\n        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\\\\\\\\n        if (index \u003c 0) {\\\\\\\\n          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        await patchCurrent({ selected });\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        // 立即调用核心切换（同步阻塞，确保核心状态立即生效）\\\\\\\\n        await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // 立即触发 UI 刷新回调（让界面立即响应）\\\\\\\\n        onSuccess?.();\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        // 后台异步执行其他操作（不阻塞下一次点击）\\\\\\\\n        Promise.all([\\\\\\\\n          doPatchCurrent(),\\\\\\\\n          syncTrayProxySelection(),\\\\\\\\n        ]).then(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n          debugLog(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理和状态同步完成: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        }).catch((err) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n          console.warn(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[ProxySelection] 后台同步失败:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", err);\\\\\\\\n        });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // 后台清理连接（异步，不阻塞）\\\\\\\\n        if (\\\\\\\\n          config.enableConnectionCleanup \u0026\u0026\\\\\\\\n          config.autoCloseConnection \u0026\u0026\\\\\\\\n          previousProxy\\\\\\\\n        ) {\\\\\\\\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e cleanupConnections(previousProxy), 0);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n        console.error(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          error,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);\\\\\\\\n          onSuccess?.();\\\\\\\\n          void Promise.all([\\\\\\\\n            doPatchCurrent(),\\\\\\\\n            syncTrayProxySelection(),\\\\\\\\n          ]).catch((e) 代理切换回退成功: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        } catch (fallbackError) {\\\\\\\\n          console.error(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换回退也失败: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n            fallbackError,\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          onError?.(fallbackError);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    [current, patchCurrent, config, onSuccess, onError],\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const handleSelectChange = useCallback(\\\\\\\\n    (\\\\\\\\n      groupName: string,\\\\\\\\n hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current) {\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current = true;\\\\\\\\n    const groups = proxiesData.groups as \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    if (urlTestOrFallback.length === 0) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 标记测速，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n    markManualDelayCheckStarted();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const run = async () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      await Promise.allSettled(\\\\\\\\n        urlTestOrFallback.map((g) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n          const url = delayManager.getUrl(g.name);\\\\\\\\n          const timeout = g.timeout ?? 5000;\\\\\\\\n          return delayGroup(g.name, url, timeout);\\\\\\\\n        }),\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      await refreshProxy();\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n    void run();\\\\\\\\n  }, [proxiesData, refreshProxy]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n    let lastProfileId: string | null = null;\\\\\\\\n    let lastUpdateTime = 0;\\\\\\\\n    const refreshThrottle = 800;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let isUnmounted = false;\\\\\\\\n    const scheduledTimeouts = new Set\u003cnumber\u003e();\\\\\\\\n    const cleanupFns: Array\u003c() =\u003e void\u003e = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const registerCleanup = (fn: () =\u003e void) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      if (isUnmounted) {\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          fn();\\\\\\\\n        } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n          console.error(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Immediate cleanup failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      } else {\\\\\\\\n        cleanupFns.push(fn);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const addWindowListener = (eventName: Promise\u003cvoid\u003e,\\\\\\\\n      delay: number,\\\\\\\\n    ) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      if (isUnmounted) return -1;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        scheduledTimeouts.delete(timeoutId);\\\\\\\\n        if (!isUnmounted) {\\\\\\\\n          void callback();\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }, delay);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      scheduledTimeouts.add(timeoutId);\\\\\\\\n      return timeoutId;\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const clearAllTimeouts = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      scheduledTimeouts.forEach((timeoutId) =\u003e clearTimeout(timeoutId));\\\\\\\\n      scheduledTimeouts.clear();\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleProfileChanged = (event: { payload: string }) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      const newProfileId = event.payload;\\\\\\\\n      const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      if (\\\\\\\\n        lastProfileId === newProfileId \u0026\u0026\\\\\\\\n        now - lastUpdateTime \u003c refreshThrottle\\\\\\\\n      ) {\\\\\\\\n        return;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      lastProfileId = newProfileId;\\\\\\\\n      lastUpdateTime = now;\\\\\\\\n      hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      scheduleTimeout(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        refreshRules().catch((error) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n          console.warn(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Rules refresh failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        refreshRuleProviders().catch((error) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n          console.warn(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Rule providers refresh failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n      }, 200);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const   // 配置重载后需要重新触发 url-test/fallback 组的测速，以更新当前节点\\\\\\\\n      hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current = false;\\\\\\\\n      scheduleTimeout(async () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        await Promise.all([\\\\\\\\n          refreshProxy().catch((error) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n            console.error(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Proxy refresh failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error),\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          refreshClashConfig().catch((error) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n            console.error(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Clash config refresh failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error),\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        ]);\\\\\\\\n      }, 200);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const handleRefreshProxy = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n      const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n      if (now - lastUpdateTime \u003c= refreshThrottle) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      lastUpdateTime = now;\\\\\\\\n      // 该事件由托盘切换节点成功时发出，标记为手动选择以抑制 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\\\\\\\\n      scheduleTimeout(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        refreshProxy().catch((error) =\u003e\\\\\\\\n          console.warn(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[DataProvider] Proxy refresh failed:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", error),\\\\\\\\n 相关代码位置总结\\\\n\\\\n### 1. 前端UI中显示当前使用节点的代码\\\\n\\\\n#### 主要UI组件：\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx&#96;**\\\\n  - 显示当前代理节点的卡片组件\\\\n  - 关键代码：\\\\n    - 第600-602行：&#96;currentProxy&#96; 获取要显示的代理节点\\\\n    - 第604-608行：获取当前节点的延迟\\\\n    - 第610-614行：信号图标显示\\\\n    - 第937-1010行：节点信息显示UI（名称、类型、延迟等）\\\\n    - 第1036-1096行：代理节点选择器\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-current-proxy.ts&#96;**\\\\n  - 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook\\\\n  - 第20-68行：从 &#96;proxies&#96; 数据中提取当前节点信息\\\\n  - 第30-50行：在规则模式下查找主要代理组\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/components/proxy/proxy-item.tsx&#96;**\\\\n  - 代理项组件，显示单个节点的详细信息\\\\n  - 第157-165行：选中状态的样式\\\\n  - 第193行：显示 &#96;proxy.now&#96;（对于fallback组显示当前使用的节点）\\\\n\\\\n### 2. 获取当前节点状态的API或函数\\\\n\\\\n#### 数据获取：\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/providers/app-data-provider.tsx&#96;**\\\\n  - 第36-40行：使用SWR获取代理数据\\\\n    &#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\n    const { data: proxiesData, mutate: refreshProxy } = useSWR(\\\\n      \\\\\\\"getProxies\\\\\\\",\\\\n      calcuProxies,\\\\n      SWR_MIHOMO,\\\\n    );\\\\n    &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/services/cmds.ts&#96;**\\\\n  - 第144行：调用 &#96;getProxies()&#96; 获取代理数据\\\\n  - 使用 &#96;tauri-plugin-mihomo-api&#96; 的API\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-proxy-selection.ts&#96;**\\\\n  - 第79行：&#96;selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName)&#96; - 切换节点的API\\\\n  - 第54-132行：&#96;changeProxy&#96; 函数处理节点切换逻辑\\\\n\\\\n#### Tauri后端（Rust）：\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src-tauri/src/core/manager/config.rs&#96;**\\\\n  - 第118行：&#96;handle.select_node_for_group(name, now).await&#96; - 后端实现\\\\n\\\\n### 3. Fallback组的节点选择逻辑\\\\n\\\\n#### 后端核心逻辑（Go）：\\\\n- **&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go&#96;**\\\\n  - 第27-30行：&#96;Now()&#96; 方法返回当前选中的节点\\\\n  - 第106-152行：&#96;findAliveProxy()&#96; - 核心选择逻辑\\\\n    - 第112-117行：如果没有手动选择，按顺序查找第一个存活的节点\\\\n    - 第118-135行：如果手动选择了节点，检查该节点是否存活\\\\n    - 第138-151行：如果没有存活节点，选择延迟最小的节点\\\\n  - 第154-182行：&#96;Set()&#96; 方法 - 手动设置节点\\\\n  - 第188-191行：&#96;NowIsManual()&#96; - 判断是否为手动选择\\\\n\\\\n#### 前端监听和通知：\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts&#96;**\\\\n  - 第112-189行：&#96;useFallbackSwitchNotify&#96; Hook\\\\n  - 第126-131行：收集所有Fallback和URLTest类型组的 &#96;now&#96; 值\\\\n  - 第144-183行：检测节点切换并发送通知\\\\n  - 第153-161行：fallback触发时清空手动选择\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/components/proxy/proxy-groups.tsx&#96;**\\\\n  - 第334行：检查组类型是否为Fallback\\\\n  - 第301-339行：&#96;handleChangeProxy&#96; 处理节点变更\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx&#96;**\\\\n  - 第318-431行：监听代理数据变化，更新显示状态\\\\n  - 第406-409行：更新当前显示的节点信息\\\\n\\\\n### 关键数据流\\\\n\\\\n1. 数据获取：&#96;getProxies()&#96; → &#96;proxiesData&#96; → &#96;state.displayProxy&#96;\\\\n2. 节点显示：&#96;state.displayProxy&#96; → &#96;currentProxy&#96; → UI渲染\\\\n3. Fallback选择：后端 &#96;findAliveProxy()&#96; → 返回 &#96;now&#96; → 前端显示\\\\n4. 手动切换：&#96;selectNodeForGroup()&#96; → 后端 &#96;Set()&#96; → 更新 &#96;selected&#96; → 返回新的 &#96;now&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 特别说明\\\\n\\\\n对于Fallback组：\\\\n- 自动选择：按顺序查找第一个存活的节点（延迟在timeout内）\\\\n- 手动选择：通过 &#96;Set()&#96; 固定选择某个节点，直到该节点不可用\\\\n- UI显示：&#96;group.now&#96; 显示当前实际使用的节点（可能是自动选择的）\\\\n- 状态同步：&#96;useFallbackSwitchNotify&#96; 监听 &#96;now&#96; 的变化并发送通知\\\\n\\\\n这些文件涵盖了当前节点显示、状态获取和fallback组选择逻辑的主要实现。\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1770021790479,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"查找节点显示相关代码\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"agent\",\"forceMode\":\"edit\",\"usageData\":{},\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-1\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDismissed\":false,\"totalLinesAdded\":0,\"totalLinesRemoved\":0,\"addedFiles\":0,\"removedFiles\":0,\"isDraft\":false,\"isCreatingWorktree\":false,\"isApplyingWorktree\":false,\"isUndoingWorktree\":false,\"applied\":false,\"pendingCreateWorktree\":false,\"isBestOfNSubcomposer\":fa gb\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) Touch() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, pd := range gb.providers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tpd.Touch()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) GetProxies(touch bool) []C.Proxy {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproviderVersions := make([]uint32, len(gb.providers))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor i, pd := range gb.providers pd.Version()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// thread safe\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.getProxiesMutex.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tdefer gb.getProxiesMutex.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif pd.VehicleType() == P.Compatible { // compatible provider unneeded filter\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = append(proxies, pd.Proxies()...)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet := map[string]struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, filterReg := range gb.filterRegs {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range pd.Proxies() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tname := p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif mat, _ := filterReg.MatchString(name); mat {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := proxiesSet[name]; !ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet[name] = = append(proxies, newProxies...)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// Multiple filers means that proxies are sorted in the order in which the filers {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxiesSet[name] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tnewProxies = append(newProxies, p)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tproxies = newProxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(gb.excludeFilterRegs) \u003e 0 p.Name()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, excludeFilterReg := range gb.excludeFilterRegs {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif mat, _ := excludeFilterReg.MatchString(name); mat {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar newProxies []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tLOOP2:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, p := range proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tmType := providerVersions\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgb.providerProxies = proxies\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn proxies\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) URLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Add(1)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tgo func() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdelay, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif err == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlock.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tmp[proxy.Name()] = delay\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlock.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\twg.Done()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\twg.Wait()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (gb *GroupBase) onDialFailed(adapterType C.AdapterType, err error, fn func()) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif adapterType == C.Direct || adapterType == time.Now()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif time.Since(gb.failedTime) \u003e time.Duration(gb.failureResetInterval)*time.Millisecond const CurrentProxyCard = \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 延迟测试\\\\\\\\n  const handleCheckDelay = useLockFn(async () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n    const groupName = state.selection.group;\\\\\\\\n    if (!groupName || isDirectMode) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    debugLog(&#96;[CurrentProxyCard] 开始测试所有延迟，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    // 标记手动测速，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n    markManualDelayCheckStarted();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const group =\\\\\\\\n      state.proxyData.records?.[groupName] ??\\\\\\\\n      state.proxyData.groups.find((g: any) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\\\\\\\\n    const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 获取当前组的所有代理\\\\\\\\n    const proxyNames: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const providers: Set\u003cstring\u003e = new Set();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\\\\\\\\n      // 全局模式\\\\\\\\n      const allProxies = proxies.global.all\\\\\\\\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n          const name = typeof p === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"string\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ? p : p.name;\\\\\\\\n          return name !== \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"DIRECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"REJECT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n        })\\\\\\\\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e (typeof p === \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"string\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ? p : p.name));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      allProxies.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\\\\\\\\n        if (proxy?.provider) {\\\\\\\\n          providers.add(proxy.provider);\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          proxyNames.push(name);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      // 规则模式\\\\\\\\n      const group = state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === groupName);\\\\\\\\n      if (group) {\\\\\\\\n        group.all.forEach((name: string) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n          const proxy = state.proxyData.records[name];\\\\\\\\n          if (proxy?.provider) {\\\\\\\\n            providers.add(proxy.provider);\\\\\\\\n          } else {\\\\\\\\n { useEffect, useRef } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"react\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { invoke } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@tauri-apps/api/core\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { useAppData } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/providers/app-data-context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { useProfiles } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/hooks/use-profiles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\nimport { debugLog } from \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"@/utils/debug\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 关闭连接操作的时间戳（此后一段时间内不发送 fallback 切换通知）\\\\\\\\nlet closeConnectionsTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// TUN/系统代理模式切换的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet proxyModeChangeTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动测速操作的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet manualDelayCheckTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动选择节点操作的时间戳\\\\\\\\nlet manualProxySelectionTimestamp = 0;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 关闭连接后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst CLOSE_CONNECTIONS_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// TUN/系统代理模式切换后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst PROXY_MODE_CHANGE_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 60000; // 1分钟\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动测速后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst MANUAL_DELAY_CHECK_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// 手动选择节点后禁用通知的时长（毫秒）\\\\\\\\nconst MANUAL_PROXY_SELECTION_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN = 10000; // 10秒\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记关闭连接操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markCloseConnectionsStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  closeConnectionsTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Close connections started at ${closeConnectionsTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记 TUN/系统代理模式切换\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 1 分钟内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markProxyModeChanged = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  proxyModeChangeTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Proxy mode changed at ${proxyModeChangeTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记手动测速操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markManualDelayCheckStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  manualDelayCheckTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Manual delay check started at ${manualDelayCheckTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 标记手动选择节点操作开始\\\\\\\\n * 在此后 10 秒内，fallback 切换不会发送通知（避免误报「节点自动切换」）\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const markManualProxySelectionStarted = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  manualProxySelectionTimestamp = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Manual proxy selection started at ${manualProxySelectionTimestamp}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 检查是否在任何冷却期内\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const isInNotifyCooldown = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查关闭连接冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (closeConnectionsTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const closeElapsed = now - closeConnectionsTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (closeElapsed \u003c CLOSE_CONNECTIONS_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"close_connections\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: closeElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查代理模式切换冷却期（1分钟）\\\\\\\\n  if (proxyModeChangeTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const modeElapsed = now - proxyModeChangeTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (modeElapsed \u003c PROXY_MODE_CHANGE_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"proxy_mode_change\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: modeElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查手动测速冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (manualDelayCheckTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const delayElapsed = now - manualDelayCheckTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (delayElapsed \u003c MANUAL_DELAY_CHECK_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"manual_delay_check\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: delayElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  // 检查手动选择节点冷却期（10秒）\\\\\\\\n  if (manualProxySelectionTimestamp \u003e 0) {\\\\\\\\n    const selectionElapsed = now - manualProxySelectionTimestamp;\\\\\\\\n    if (selectionElapsed \u003c MANUAL_PROXY_SELECTION_NOTIFY_COOLDOWN) {\\\\\\\\n      return { inCooldown: true, reason: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"manual_proxy_selection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", elapsed: selectionElapsed };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return { inCooldown: false, reason: null, elapsed: 0 };\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * Hook to monitor fallback/urltest proxy group switches and send notifications\\\\\\\\n * Only sends notifications when the switch is NOT triggered by close-all-connections\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport const useFallbackSwitchNotify = () =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n  const { proxies: proxiesData } = useAppData();\\\\\\\\n  const { current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles } = useProfiles();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // 保存上一次的代理组状态\\\\\\\\n  const previousGroupsRef = useRef\u003cMap\u003cstring, string\u003e\u003e(new Map());\\\\\\\\n  // 是否已初始化（跳过首次加载）\\\\\\\\n  const isInitializedRef = useRef(false);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n    if (!proxiesData?.groups) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const currentGroups = new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 收集当前所有 Fallback 和 URLTest 类型组的 now 值\\\\\\\\n    for (const group of proxiesData.groups) {\\\\\\\\n      if ([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"URLTest\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fallback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"].includes(group.type) \u0026\u0026 group.now) {\\\\\\\\n        currentGroups.set(group.name, group.now);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 首次加载，只保存状态不检测变化\\\\\\\\n    if (!isInitializedRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n      previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\\\\\\\\n      isInitializedRef.current = true;\\\\\\\\n      debugLog(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[FallbackNotify] Initialized with groups:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", Object.fromEntries(currentGroups));\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 检测变化\\\\\\\\n    const previousGroups = previousGroupsRef.current;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\\\\\\\\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // 检测到节点切换\\\\\\\\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\\\\\\\\n        debugLog(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // fallback 触发：清空该组的手动选择，界面不再显示「当前节点」\\\\\\\\n        if (current) {\\\\\\\\n          const next = (current.selected ?? []).filter((s) =\u003e s.name !== groupName);\\\\\\\\n          if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {\\\\\\\\n            patchCurrent({ selected: next })\\\\\\\\n              .then(() =\u003e mutateProfiles())\\\\\\\\n              .catch(() =\u003e {});\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\\\\\\\\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\\\\\\\\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\\\\\\\\n          debugLog(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n        } else {\\\\\\\\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\\\\\n          invoke(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\\n            group: groupName,\\\\\\\\n            from: previousNow,\\\\\\\\n            to: (\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"strings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sync\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/atomic\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/singledo\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tC \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/log\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github.com/dlclark/regexp2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"golang.org/x/sync/errgroup\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype HealthCheckOption struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tURL      string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tInterval uint\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype extraOption struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfilters        map[string]struct{}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype HealthCheck struct {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tctx            context.Context\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tctxCancel      context.CancelFunc\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl            string\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\textra          map[string]*extraOption\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tmu             sync.Mutex\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tproxies        []C.Proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tinterval       time.Duration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tlazy           bool\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tlastTouch      atomic.TypedValue[time.Time]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tsingleDo       *singledo.Single[struct{}]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ttimeout        time.Duration\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) process() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tticker := time.NewTicker(hc.interval)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tgo hc.check()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tselect {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcase \u003c-ticker.C:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlastTouch := hc.lastTouch.Load()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tsince := time.Since(lastTouch)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif !hc.lazy || since \u003c hc.interval {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.check()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t} else {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Skip once health check because we are lazy\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcase \u003c-hc.ctx.Done():\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tticker.Stop()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) setProxies(proxies []C.Proxy) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.proxies = proxies\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) registerHealthCheckTask(url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16], filter string, interval uint) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl = strings.TrimSpace(url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(url) == 0 || url == hc.url {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ignore invalid health check url: %s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.mu.Lock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tdefer hc.mu.Unlock()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// if the provider has not set up health checks, then modify it to be the same as the group's interval\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif hc.interval == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.interval = time.Duration(interval) * time.Second\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif hc.extra == nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.extra = make(map[string]*extraOption)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t// prioritize the use of previously registered configurations, especially those from provider\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif _, ok := hc.extra[url]; ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// provider default health check does not set filter\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif url != hc.url \u0026\u0026 len(filter) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tsplitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter, hc.extra[url])\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"health check url: %s exists\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\toption := \u0026extraOption{filters: map[string]struct{}{}, expectedStatus: expectedStatus}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tsplitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.extra[url] = option\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc splitAndAddFiltersToExtra(filter string, option *extraOption) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfilter = strings.TrimSpace(filter)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(filter) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, regex := range strings.Split(filter, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tregex = strings.TrimSpace(regex)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(regex) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\toption.filters[regex] = struct{}{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) auto() bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn hc.interval != 0\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) touch() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.lastTouch.Store(time.Now())\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) check() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(hc.proxies) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t_, _, _ = hc.singleDo.Do(func() (struct{}, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tid := utils.NewUUIDV4().String()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Start New Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb := new(errgroup.Group)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb.SetLimit(30)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// execute default health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\toption := \u0026extraOption{filters: nil, expectedStatus: hc.expectedStatus}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.execute(b, hc.url, id, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// execute extra health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(hc.extra) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor url, option := range hc.extra {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thc.execute(b, url, id, option)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t_ = b.Wait()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Finish A Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", id)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn struct{}{}, nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t})\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) execute(b *errgroup.Group, url, uid string, option *extraOption) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\turl = strings.TrimSpace(url)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif len(url) == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Check has been skipped due to testUrl is empty, {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar filterReg *regexp2.Regexp\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif option != nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\texpectedStatus = option.expectedStatus\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif len(option.filters) != 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilters := make([]string, 0, len(option.filters))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor filter := range option.filters {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilters = append(filters, filter)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfilterReg = regexp2.MustCompile(strings.Join(filters, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"), regexp2.None)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, proxy := range hc.proxies {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t// skip proxies that do not require health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif filterReg != nil {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tif match, _ := filterReg.MatchString(proxy.Name()); !match {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tcontinue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tp := proxy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tb.Go(func() error {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(hc.ctx, hc.timeout)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tdefer cancel()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Checking, proxy: %s, url: %s, id: {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", p.Name(), url, uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Health Checked, proxy: %s, url: %s, alive: %t, delay: %d ms uid: {%s}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", p.Name(), url, p.AliveForTestUrl(url), p.LastDelayForTestUrl(url), uid)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn nil\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t})\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) close() {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thc.ctxCancel()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunc NewHealthCheck(proxies []C.Proxy, url string, timeout uint, interval uint, lazy bool, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) AliveForTestUrl implements C.Proxy\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) AliveForTestUrl(url string) bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif state, ok := p.extra.Load(url); ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn state.alive.Load()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn p.alive.Load()\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.Conn, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tconn, err := p.ProxyAdapter.DialContext(ctx, metadata)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn conn, err\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// p.ProxyAdapter.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn pc, err\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// DelayHistory implements C.Proxy\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) DelayHistory() []C.DelayHistory {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tqueueM := p.history.Copy()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thistories := []C.DelayHistory{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, item := range queueM {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thistories = append(histories, item)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn histories\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// DelayHistoryForTestUrl implements C.Proxy\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) DelayHistoryForTestUrl(url string) state.history.Copy()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thistories := []C.DelayHistory{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tfor _, item := range queueM {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thistories = append(histories, item)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn histories\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// ExtraDelayHistories return all delay histories for each test URL\\\\\\\\n// implements C.Proxy\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) ExtraDelayHistories() map[string]C.ProxyState {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\thistories := map[string]C.ProxyState{}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tp.extra.Range(func(k string, v *internalProxyState) bool {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\ttestUrl := k\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tstate := v\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tqueueM := state.history.Copy()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tvar history []C.DelayHistory\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tfor _, item := range queueM {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thistory = append(history, item)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thistories[testUrl] = C.ProxyState{\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\tAlive: histories\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// LastDelayForTestUrl return last history record of the specified URL. if proxy is not alive, return the max value of uint16.\\\\\\\\n// implements C.Proxy\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) LastDelayForTestUrl(url string) (delay uint16) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar maxDelay uint16 = 0xffff\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\talive := false\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tvar history C.DelayHistory\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif state, ok := p.extra.Load(url); ok {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\talive = state.alive.Load()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\thistory = state.history.Last()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tif !alive || history.Delay == 0 {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t\\\\\\\\treturn maxDelay\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\t}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\treturn history.Delay\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter\\\\\\\\nfunc (p *Proxy) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\tinner, err := Fallback Proxy Group 实现逻辑分析\\\\n\\\\n### 1. 节点选择算法 (&#96;findAliveProxy&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n**核心文件**: &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go&#96; (106-152行)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;106:152:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go\\\\nfunc (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\\\\n\\\\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)\\\\n\\\\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout\\\\n\\\\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\ttimeoutMs = 5000\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif len(f.selected) == 0 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\treturn proxy\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t} else {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\talive := false\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif f.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(f.selectedTimeout))\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tdefer cancel()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t_, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\talive = err == nil\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t} else {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\talive = proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif alive {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\treturn proxy\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tf.selected = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first\\\\n\\\\tvar best C.Proxy\\\\n\\\\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)\\\\n\\\\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\td := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif d \u003c minDelay {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tminDelay = d\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tbest = proxy\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\tif best != nil {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn best\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\treturn proxies[0]\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**选择逻辑**:\\\\n1. 无手动选择时：按顺序遍历，返回第一个满足 &#96;AliveForTestUrl == true&#96; 且延迟 ≤ &#96;TestTimeout&#96; 的节点\\\\n2. 有手动选择时：优先检查选中节点；不可用时清空 &#96;selected&#96;，回退到自动选择\\\\n3. 无可用节点时：选择延迟最小的节点（即使超时）\\\\n4. 无延迟记录时：返回第一个节点\\\\n\\\\n### 2. 健康检查逻辑\\\\n\\\\n**定期健康检查** (&#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go&#96;):\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;123:148:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go\\\\nfunc (hc *HealthCheck) check() {\\\\n\\\\tif len(hc.proxies) == 0 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t_, _, _ = hc.singleDo.Do(func() (struct{}, error) {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tid := utils.NewUUIDV4().String()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\"Start New Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\", id)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tb := new(errgroup.Group)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tb.SetLimit(30)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t// execute default health check\\\\n\\\\t\\\\toption := \u0026extraOption{filters: nil, expectedStatus: hc.expectedStatus}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\thc.execute(b, hc.url, id, option)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t// execute extra health check\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif len(hc.extra) != 0 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tfor url, option := range hc.extra {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\thc.execute(b, url, id, option)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t_ = b.Wait()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\"Finish A Health Checking {%s}\\\\\\\", id)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn struct{}{}, nil\\\\n\\\\t})\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- 默认间隔：300秒（可在配置中设置）\\\\n- 并发：最多30个节点同时测试\\\\n- 测试方法：通过 &#96;URLTest&#96; 发送 HTTP HEAD 请求\\\\n\\\\n**被动健康检查** C.RejectDrop {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\tif errors.Is(err, C.ErrNotSupport) {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\treturn\\\\n\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\tgo func() {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif strings.Contains(err.Error(), \\\\\\\"connection refused\\\\\\\") {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tfn()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\treturn\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tgb.failedTestMux.Lock()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tdefer gb.failedTestMux.Unlock()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tgb.failedTimes++\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif gb.failedTimes == 1 {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\"ProxyGroup: %s first failed\\\\\\\", gb.Name())\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tgb.failedTime = time.Now()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t} else {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif time.Since(gb.failedTime) \u003e time.Duration(gb.failureResetInterval)*time.Millisecond {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tgb.failedTimes = 0\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\treturn\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tlog.Debugln(\\\\\\\"ProxyGroup: %s failed count: %d\\\\\\\", gb.Name(), gb.failedTimes)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tif gb.failedTimes \u003e= gb.maxFailedTimes {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tlog.Warnln(\\\\\\\"because %s failed multiple times, active health check\\\\\\\", gb.Name())\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tfn()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t}()\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n触发条件：\\\\n- 立即触发：错误包含 \\\\\\\"connection refused\\\\\\\"\\\\n- 累计触发：失败次数 ≥ &#96;maxFailedTimes&#96;（默认5次），且在 &#96;failureResetInterval&#96;（默认5000ms）内\\\\n\\\\n### 3. 节点切换时的状态更新逻辑\\\\n\\\\n**连接失败处理** {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tp.history.Pop()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tstate, _ := p.extra.LoadOrStoreFn(url, func() *internalProxyState {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\treturn \u0026internalProxyState{\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\thistory: queue.New[C.DelayHistory](defaultHistoriesNum),\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t\\\\talive:   atomic.NewBool(true),\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t})\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif !satisfied {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\trecord.Delay = 0\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\talive = false\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tstate.alive.Store(alive)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tstate.history.Put(record)\\\\n\\\\t\\\\tif state.history.Len() \u003e defaultHistoriesNum {\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t\\\\tstate.history.Pop()\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\t}()\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 4. 状态更新和通知机制\\\\n\\\\n**前端监控** (&#96;clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts&#96;):\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;112:189:clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts\\\\nexport const useFallbackSwitchNotify = () =\u003e {\\\\n  const { proxies: proxiesData } = useAppData();\\\\n  const { current, patchCurrent, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles } = useProfiles();\\\\n\\\\n  // 保存上一次的代理组状态\\\\n  const previousGroupsRef = useRef\u003cMap\u003cstring, string\u003e\u003e(new Map());\\\\n  // 是否已初始化（跳过首次加载）\\\\n  const isInitializedRef = useRef(false);\\\\n\\\\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\\\\n    if (!proxiesData?.groups) return;\\\\n\\\\n    const currentGroups = new Map\u003cstring, string\u003e();\\\\n\\\\n    // 收集当前所有 Fallback 和 URLTest 类型组的 now 值\\\\n    for (const group of proxiesData.groups) {\\\\n      if ([\\\\\\\"URLTest\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Fallback\\\\\\\"].includes(group.type) \u0026\u0026 group.now) {\\\\n        currentGroups.set(group.name, group.now);\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // 首次加载，只保存状态不检测变化\\\\n    if (!isInitializedRef.current) {\\\\n      previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\\\\n      isInitializedRef.current = true;\\\\n      debugLog(\\\\\\\"[FallbackNotify] Initialized with groups:\\\\\\\", Object.fromEntries(currentGroups));\\\\n      return;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // 检测变化\\\\n    const previousGroups = previousGroupsRef.current;\\\\n\\\\n    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {\\\\n      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);\\\\n\\\\n      // 检测到节点切换\\\\n      if (previousNow \u0026\u0026 previousNow !== currentNow) {\\\\n        debugLog(\\\\n          &#96;[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -\u003e ${currentNow}&#96;,\\\\n        );\\\\n\\\\n        // fallback 触发：清空该组的手动选择，界面不再显示「当前节点」\\\\n        if (current) {\\\\n          const next = (current.selected ?? []).filter((s) =\u003e s.name !== groupName);\\\\n          if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {\\\\n            patchCurrent({ selected: next })\\\\n              .then(() =\u003e mutateProfiles())\\\\n              .catch(() =\u003e {});\\\\n          }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        // 检查是否在冷却期内\\\\n        const cooldownStatus = isInNotifyCooldown();\\\\n        if (cooldownStatus.inCooldown) {\\\\n          debugLog(\\\\n            &#96;[FallbackNotify] Skipping notification (${cooldownStatus.reason}, ${cooldownStatus.elapsed}ms elapsed)&#96;,\\\\n          );\\\\n        } else {\\\\n          // 发送 fallback 切换通知\\\\n          invoke(\\\\\\\"notify_fallback_proxy_switched\\\\\\\", {\\\\n            group: groupName,\\\\n            from: previousNow,\\\\n            to: currentNow,\\\\n          })\\\\n            .then(() =\u003e {\\\\n              debugLog(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Notification sent for group ${groupName}&#96;);\\\\n            })\\\\n            .catch((error) =\u003e {\\\\n              console.error(&#96;[FallbackNotify] Failed to send notification:&#96;, error);\\\\n            });\\\\n        }\\\\n      }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    // 更新保存的状态\\\\n    previousGroupsRef.current = currentGroups;\\\\n  }, [proxiesData?.groups, current, patchCurrent, mutateProfiles]);\\\\n};\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**通知机制**:\\\\n- 前端通过轮询检测 &#96;group.now&#96; 变化\\\\n- 检测到切换时：\\\\n  1. 清空该组的手动选择状态\\\\n  2. 检查冷却期（避免误报）\\\\n  3. 发送通知给用户\\\\n\\\\n## 关键文件路径总结\\\\n\\\\n1. 节点选择算法: &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go&#96;\\\\n2. 健康检查逻辑: &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/provider/healthcheck.go&#96;\\\\n3. 失败处理: &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/groupbase.go&#96;\\\\n4. 状态更新: &#96;core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/adapter.go&#96;\\\\n5. 前端通知: &#96;clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts&#96;\\\\n\\\\n以上为 fallback proxy group 非常好，我现在了解了整个系统的架构。让我总结一下问题所在：

1. **前端显示逻辑**：`clash-verge-rev/src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx` 和 `clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-current-proxy.ts` 负责显示当前节点

2. **后端节点选择**：`core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go` 中的 `findAliveProxy()` 方法负责实际选择节点

3. **问题核心**：
   - 后端 fallback 组会自动选择第一个存活的节点，并更新 `now` 字段
   - 前端应该显示 `group.now`，但可能在启动时没有正确初始化或同步

这说明系统确实支持这三种类型的代理组。但是在 `current-proxy-card.tsx` 第 370 行，只过滤了 `Selector` 类型，没有包括 `Fallback` 和 `URLTest` 类型。

_**Agent (default)**_

完美！我找到了问题的根源。

## 问题分析

在 `current-proxy-card.tsx` 的第 370 行，代码只收集了 `Selector` 类型的代理组：

```369:371:clash-verge-rev/src/components/home/current-proxy-card.tsx
      (proxies.groups || [])
        .filter((g: { type?: string }) => g?.type === "Selector")
        .forEach((selectorGroup: any) => registerGroup(selectorGroup));
```

但是您使用的是 **Fallback 类型的组**，这些组不会被收集到 `filteredGroups` 中。因此：

1. 当启动时，代码找不到您选择的 Fallback 组
2. 它会显示第一个节点（第 396 行：`firstGroup.all[0]`）
3. 而实际上后端的 Fallback 逻辑会自动选择第一个存活的节点（这可能不是第一个节点）

而在 `proxy-groups.tsx` 中，我看到正确的代码应该支持三种类型：

```334:334:clash-verge-rev/src/components/proxy/proxy-groups.tsx
      if (!["Selector", "URLTest", "Fallback"].includes(group.type)) return;
```

## 修复方案

修改第 370 行，将过滤条件改为包含所有可选的代理组类型：

_**Agent (default)**_

很好！修复已完成。让我总结一下这个问题：

## 问题总结

**根本原因**：
在 `current-proxy-card.tsx` 中，显示当前节点的逻辑只收集了 `Selector` 类型的代理组，没有包括 `Fallback` 和 `URLTest` 类型的组。

**问题表现**：
- 启动后界面显示第一个节点（`firstGroup.all[0]`）
- 但实际上 Fallback 组会自动选择第一个**存活**的节点
- 导致显示和实际使用的节点不一致

**修复内容**：
将代理组过滤条件从只包含 `Selector` 类型，改为包含 `Selector`、`URLTest` 和 `Fallback` 三种类型：

```typescript
// 修复前
.filter((g: { type?: string }) => g?.type === "Selector")

// 修复后
.filter((g: { type?: string }) => ["Selector", "URLTest", "Fallback"].includes(g?.type || ""))
```

现在界面会正确显示 Fallback 组的 `now` 字段（实际使用的节点），而不是简单地显示列表中的第一个节点。

**建议**：
请重新编译并测试应用，确认现在显示的节点与日志中使用的节点一致。

---

_**User**_

现在手动选择节点相关逻辑是什么样的？

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
用户想了解手动选择节点的相关逻辑。我需要查找手动选择节点的代码，包括：
1. 前端如何处理用户手动选择节点
2. 如何保存手动选择的状态
3. 后端如何处理手动选择
4. Fallback组如何区分手动选择和自动选择</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

完美！现在让我为您详细说明手动选择节点的完整逻辑：

## 手动选择节点的完整逻辑

### 1. **数据结构**

#### Profile 配置 (前端)
```typescript
interface IProfileItem {
  uid: string;
  selected?: {
    name?: string;  // 代理组名称
    now?: string;   // 手动选择的节点名称
  }[];
}
```

每个 Profile 保存了用户手动选择的节点列表，例如：
```json
{
  "selected": [
    { "name": "PROXY", "now": "香港节点1" },
    { "name": "Netflix", "now": "美国节点2" }
  ]
}
```

#### Fallback 组内部状态 (后端 Go)
```go
type Fallback struct {
  selected string  // 手动选择的节点名称，为空表示自动选择
}
```

---

### 2. **手动选择流程**

#### 前端操作 (`use-proxy-selection.ts`)

```54:79:clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-proxy-selection.ts
  const changeProxy = useCallback(
    async (
      groupName: string,
      proxyName: string,
      previousProxy?: string,
      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,
    ) => {
      debugLog(`[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -> ${proxyName}`);
      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知
      markManualProxySelectionStarted();

      const doPatchCurrent = async () => {
        if (!current || skipConfigSave) return;
        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];
        const index = selected.findIndex((item) => item.name === groupName);
        if (index < 0) {
          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });
        } else {
          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };
        }
        await patchCurrent({ selected });
      };

      try {
        // 立即调用核心切换（同步阻塞，确保核心状态立即生效）
        await selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName);
```

**步骤**：
1. 标记手动选择操作开始（10秒冷却期，防止误报自动切换）
2. **立即调用后端** `selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName)` 切换节点
3. **异步保存**到 Profile 的 `selected` 字段
4. 触发 UI 刷新
5. 可选：清理旧连接

---

### 3. **后端处理 (Fallback.go)**

#### Set 方法：设置手动选择

```154:182:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go
func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {
	var p C.Proxy
	for _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {
		if proxy.Name() == name {
			p = proxy
			break
		}
	}

	if p == nil {
		return errors.New("proxy not exist")
	}

	f.selected = name
	// 固定测速：选中节点时始终执行一次 URLTest，更新延迟与存活状态
	timeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout
	if timeoutMs <= 0 {
		timeoutMs = f.TestTimeout
	}
	if timeoutMs <= 0 {
		timeoutMs = 5000
	}
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))
	defer cancel()
	expectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)
	_, _ = p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)

	return nil
}
```

**关键操作**：
- 设置 `f.selected = name`（标记为手动选择）
- 立即对该节点执行健康检查，更新延迟

#### findAliveProxy：优先使用手动选择的节点

```106:136:core/src/foss/golang/clash/adapter/outboundgroup/fallback.go
func (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {
	proxies := f.GetProxies(touch)
	timeoutMs := f.TestTimeout
	if timeoutMs <= 0 {
		timeoutMs = 5000
	}
	for _, proxy := range proxies {
		if len(f.selected) == 0 {
			// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout
			if proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) && proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) <= uint16(timeoutMs) {
				return proxy
			}
		} else {
			if proxy.Name() == f.selected {
				alive := false
				if f.selectedTimeout > 0 {
					ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(f.selectedTimeout))
					defer cancel()
					expectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)
					_, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)
					alive = err == nil
				} else {
					alive = proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)
				}
				if alive {
					return proxy
				}
				f.selected = ""
			}
		}
	}
```

**逻辑**：
- 如果 `f.selected` 为空 → **自动选择**第一个存活节点
- 如果 `f.selected` 不为空 → 检查该节点是否存活
  - 存活 → 使用手动选择的节点
  - 不存活 → **清空 `f.selected`**，回退到自动选择

---

### 4. **自动切换与手动选择冲突处理**

#### 前端监听切换 (`use-fallback-switch-notify.ts`)

```144:161:clash-verge-rev/src/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify.ts
    for (const [groupName, currentNow] of currentGroups) {
      const previousNow = previousGroups.get(groupName);

      // 检测到节点切换
      if (previousNow && previousNow !== currentNow) {
        debugLog(
          `[FallbackNotify] Detected switch in group ${groupName}: ${previousNow} -> ${currentNow}`,
        );

        // fallback 触发：清空该组的手动选择，界面不再显示「当前节点」
        if (current) {
          const next = (current.selected ?? []).filter((s) => s.name !== groupName);
          if (next.length !== (current.selected ?? []).length) {
            patchCurrent({ selected: next })
              .then(() => mutateProfiles())
              .catch(() => {});
          }
        }
```

**关键逻辑**：
- 监听 `group.now` 变化
- 如果检测到自动切换（节点变化）→ **清空该组的 `selected` 记录**
- 此时界面不再显示"手动选择"标记

---

### 5. **UI 显示逻辑 (`proxy-groups.tsx`)**

```111:125:clash-verge-rev/src/components/proxy/proxy-groups.tsx
  // 仅 Selector 组且 profile 的 current.selected 与 core 当前 now 一致时显示「手动选择」（与安卓端 nowIsManual 对齐：仅当 core 与 profile 同步时显示）
  const getManualSelectionForGroup = useCallback(
    (groupName: string): string | undefined => {
      const group = groups?.find(
        (g: { name: string; type: string }) => g.name === groupName,
      );
      if (group?.type !== "Selector") return undefined;
      const entry = (current?.selected ?? []).find((s) => s.name === groupName);
      const profileNow = entry?.now;
      if (profileNow == null) return undefined;
      const coreNow = selectedByGroup.get(groupName);
      return coreNow === profileNow ? profileNow : undefined;
    },
    [groups, current?.selected, selectedByGroup],
  );
```

**显示条件**（仅 Selector 组）：
1. `group.type === "Selector"`（Fallback/URLTest 不显示手动图标）
2. Profile 中有该组的 `selected` 记录
3. Profile 的 `now` 与后端实际 `now` 一致（同步）

**注意**：Fallback 组**不显示手动选择图标**，但实际上后端会记住手动选择状态。

---

### 6. **手动选择的生命周期**

| 触发事件 | Profile.selected | Fallback.selected | 实际使用节点 |
|---------|-----------------|-------------------|-------------|
| 初始启动 | 空 | 空 | 第一个存活节点 |
| 用户手动选择 | 保存 | 保存 | 手动选择的节点 |
| 手动节点不可用 | 保留 | **清空** | 第一个存活节点 |
| 检测到自动切换 | **清空** | 空 | 第一个存活节点 |
| 重新启动代理 | **清空** | 空 | 第一个存活节点 |

---

### 7. **关键 API**

#### 后端 (Go)
```go
func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error          // 设置手动选择
func (f *Fallback) NowIsManual() bool              // 返回 f.selected != ""
func (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection()          // 清空手动选择
```

#### 前端 (Tauri API)
```typescript
selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName)  // 调用后端切换节点
```

#### Profile 管理
```typescript
patchCurrent({ selected: [...] })         // 保存手动选择到 Profile
```

---

## 总结

**手动选择的核心机制**：
1. **双重记录**：Profile (前端持久化) + Fallback.selected (后端运行时状态)
2. **智能回退**：手动节点不可用时，自动清空手动选择，回退到自动选择
3. **冷却机制**：手动操作后 10 秒内不触发自动切换通知
4. **状态同步**：检测到自动切换后，清空 Profile 的 selected 记录

这个设计确保了手动选择的优先级，同时在节点失效时能够自动恢复到健康的节点。

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
找到了！failedTesting 是关键。当 failedTesting 为 true 时（正在进行健康检查），healthCheck() 会直接返回。这可能导致用户手动选择节点时无法切换。

让我检查 Set 方法和手动选择时是否也被这个机制阻塞。</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
我发现了几个可能导致节点切换失败的问题：

1. **URLTest 超时问题**：在 `Set()` 方法中，每次手动选择节点都会执行一次 URLTest（第 179 行），如果超时设置过长或网络慢，用户会感觉没反应。

2. **failedTesting 锁**：虽然 `Set()` 方法本身不检查这个锁，但如果正在进行健康检查，可能会有资源竞争。

3. **GetProxies 可能阻塞**：`GetProxies(false)` 可能需要等待 provider 更新。

让我检查更多细节。</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

        "contents": "package outboundgroup\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/callback\"\n\tN \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/net\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/singledo\"\n\t\"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/common/utils\"\n\tC \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant\"\n\tP \"github.com/metacubex/mihomo/constant/provider\"\n)\n\ntype urlTestOption func(*URLTest)\n\nfunc urlTestWithTolerance(tolerance uint16) urlTestOption {\n\treturn func(u *URLTest) {\n\t\tu.tolerance = tolerance\n\t}\n}\n\ntype URLTest struct {\n\t*GroupBase\n\tselected       string\n\ttestUrl        string\n\texpectedStatus string\n\ttolerance      uint16\n\tdisableUDP     bool\n\tHidden         bool\n\tIcon           string\n\tfastNode       C.Proxy\n\tfastSingle     *singledo.Single[C.Proxy]\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) Now() string {\n\treturn u.fast(false).Name()\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range u.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\tu.ForceSet(name)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tu.selected = name\n\tu.fastSingle.Reset()\n}\n\n// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) DialContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (c C.Conn, err error) {\n\tproxy := u.fast(true)\n\tc, err = proxy.DialContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tc.AppendToChains(u)\n\t} else {\n\t\tu.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, u.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\tif N.NeedHandshake(c) {\n\t\tc = callback.NewFirstWriteCallBackConn(c, func(err error) {\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tu.onDialSuccess()\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tu.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, u.healthCheck)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, err\n}\n\n// ListenPacketContext implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tproxy := u.fast(true)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":            f.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":             f.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":             all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\":         f.testUrl,\n\t\t\"expectedStatus\": f.expectedStatus,\n\t\t\"fixed\":           f.selected,\n\t\t\"selectedTimeout\": f.selectedTimeout,\n\t\t\"hidden\":          f.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":            f.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (f *Fallback) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxy := f.findAliveProxy(touch)\n\treturn proxy\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)\n\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\tif len(f.selected) == 0 {\n\t\t\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout\n\t\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {\n\t\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {\n\t\t\t\talive := false\n\t\t\t\tif f.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(f.selectedTimeout))\n\t\t\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\t\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t\t\t_, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t\t\talive = err == nil\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\talive = proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif alive {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first\n\tvar best C.Proxy\n\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\td := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\tif d \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\tminDelay = d\n\t\t\tbest = proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif best != nil {\n\t\treturn best\n\t}\n\treturn proxies[0]\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (u *URLTest) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {\n\tproxy := u.fast(true)\n\tpc, err := proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tpc.AppendToChains(u)\n\t} else {\n\t\tu.onDialFailed(proxy.Type(), err, u.healthCheck)\n\t}\n\n\treturn pc, err\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn u.fast(touch)\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) healthCheck() {\n\tu.fastSingle.Reset()\n\tu.GroupBase.healthCheck()\n\tu.fastSingle.Reset()\n}\n\nfunc (u *URLTest) fast(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\telm, _, shared := u.fastSingle.Do(func() (C.Proxy, error) {\n\t\tproxies := u.GetProxies(touch)\n\t\tif u.selected != \"\" {\n\t\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == u.selected {\n\t\t\t\t\tu.fastNode = proxy\n\t\t\t\t\treturn proxy, nil\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfast := proxies[0]\n\t\tminDelay := fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)\n\t\tfastNotExist := true\n\n\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies[1:] {\n\t\t\tif u.fastNode != nil \u0026\u0026 proxy.Name() == u.fastNode.Name() {\n\t\t\t\tfastNotExist = false\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdelay := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)\n\t\t\tif delay \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\t\tfast = proxy\n\t\t\t\tminDelay = delay\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t}\n\t\t// tolerance\n\t\tif u.fastNode == nil || fastNotExist || !u.fastNode.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) || u.fastNode.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl) \u003e fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)+u.tolerance {\n\t\t\tu.fastNode = fast\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn u.fastNode, nil\n\t})\n\tif shared \u0026\u0026 touch { // a shared fastSingle.Do() may cause providers untouched, so we touch them again\n\t\tu.Touch()\n\t}\n\n\treturn elm\n}\n\n// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) SupportUDP() bool {\n\tif u.disableUDP {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn u.fast(false).SupportUDP()\n}\n\n// IsL3Protocol implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (u *URLTest) IsL3Protocol(metadata *C.Metadata) bool {\n\treturn u.fast(false).IsL3Protocol(metadata)\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements C.ProxyAdapter",

            "text": "\t\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\tfast := proxies[0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t\tminDelay := fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\tfastNotExist := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies[1:] {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\t\tif u.fastNode != nil \u0026\u0026 proxy.Name() == u.fastNode.Name() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfastNotExist = false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\t\t\tdelay := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\t\tif delay \u003c minDelay {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfast = proxy"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
